events.title: US Issues Stern Warning on Uranium Enrichment
events.description: The White House sets a strict deadline for Iran to halt 60% uranium enrichment.

events.title: Protests Erupt in Tehran
events.description: Large-scale anti-government protests break out over economic conditions.

events.title: Israel Briefs White House on Strike Plans
events.description: Leaked intelligence suggests PM Netanyahu briefed the US on potential unilateral strike packages.

events.title: Houthi Drone Strikes Red Sea Tanker
events.description: A commercial oil tanker is struck by a suspected Iranian-supplied drone.

events.title: Oman Mediation Talks Collapse
events.description: Indirect talks mediated by Oman between US and Iranian diplomats fail to produce a breakthrough.

events.title: US Increases Sanctions on Iranian Drone Manufacturers
events.description: Treasury Dept blacklists 15 shell companies supplying drone parts.

events.title: Massive US Naval Buildup
events.description: Satellite imagery confirms two US carrier strike groups in the Gulf.
events.impact: Oil markets price in war premium.

events.title: Cyberattack on Israeli Water Infrastructure
events.description: Iranian-linked hackers attempt to breach municipal water controls in Tel Aviv.

events.title: Israel Intercepts Drone Swarm from Syria
events.description: Iron Dome and David's Sling activate extensively in the Golan Heights.

events.title: UN Secretary General Warns of Grave Threat
events.description: António Guterres calls for immediate cessation of hostilities.

events.title: US Intelligence Warns of Imminent Gulf Threats
events.description: Declassified reports show drone battery movements.

events.title: Cyberattack Cripples Kuwaiti Oil Infrastructure
events.description: Operations paused at major terminal.

events.title: US Embassies in Middle East Begin Evacuations
events.description: Non-essential staff ordered out of Iraq, Lebanon, and Bahrain.

events.title: Iran Threatens to Close Strait of Hormuz
events.description: IRGC naval commander states the strait will be closed if Iranian oil exports are targeted.

events.title: Unprecedented Communications Blackout in Iran
events.description: Internet and cellphone networks go dark across major Iranian cities.

events.title: Operation Epic Fury Commences
events.description: Joint US-Israeli military operation begins.

events.title: Strikes on Natanz Enrichment Facility
events.description: Heavy bunker-buster munitions deployed against underground nuclear sites.

events.title: Fordow Fuel Enrichment Plant Highly Damaged
events.description: Second wave of strikes hits deep mountain facilities.

events.title: Iranian Air Defenses Suppressed
events.description: US electronic warfare planes blind coastal radar systems.

events.title: Bandar Abbas Naval Base Struck
events.description: Tomahawk cruise missiles destroy speedboats and submarine pens.

events.title: Explosions Near Isfahan Military Complex
events.description: Drone manufacturing hubs heavily hit.

events.title: China Condemns Violation of Sovereignty
events.description: Beijing issues strong statement against unprovoked attacks.

events.title: Parchin Military Complex Bombarded
events.description: Facilities linked to weaponization research destroyed.

events.title: Global Air Travel Diverted
events.description: Commercial flights rerouted entirely away from Middle East airspace.

events.title: Russian Statements of Support for Iran
events.description: Moscow calls an emergency UN Security Council meeting.

events.title: IRGC Headquarters in Tehran Decimated
events.description: Precision strikes target command and control centers in the capital.

events.title: US Pentagon Press Briefing
events.description: DOD confirms massive degradation of Iranian offensive capabilities.

events.title: Major Iranian Leadership Causalities Reported
events.description: Unverified reports suggest Ayatollah Ali Khamenei assassinated.

events.title: Secondary Explosions at Missile Silos
events.description: Kermanshah ballistic missile bases continue burning.

events.title: Saudi Arabia Closes Airspace
events.description: Riyadh braces for spillover violence.

events.title: Cyber Retaliation on US Financial Sector
events.description: DDoS attacks temporarily slow Wall Street banking portals.

events.title: Operation Roaring Lion Concludes Phase 1
events.description: Israeli officials declare primary nuclear targets eliminated.

events.title: Hezbollah Mobilizes on Northern Border
events.description: Lebanese militant front begins heavy artillery fire into Northern Israel.

events.title: US Embassies in Europe High Alert
events.description: Intelligence suggests sleeper cell activations globally.

events.title: Iran TV Broadcasts Surviving Commander
events.description: IRGC general promises 'earth-shattering revenge' before dawn.

events.title: First Wave: Ballistic Missiles Launched
events.description: Radar detects multiple launches from deep underground silos in Iran.

events.title: Missiles Strike Tel Aviv Outskirts
events.description: A few missiles penetrate the Arrow defense grid, causing structure damage.

events.title: Al Udeid Air Base Qatar Attacked
events.description: Largest US base in region hit by drone swarms.

events.title: US Navy Destroyer Engages Threat in Gulf
events.description: USS Thomas Hudner shoots down 4 anti-ship cruise missiles.

events.title: Missiles Hit Gulf Bases in Bahrain and UAE
events.description: Heavy barrage targets US 5th Fleet headquarters in Manama and Al Dhafra AB.

events.title: Pentagon Confirms Initial Causalities
events.description: 3 US Service members confirmed KIA, 5 severely injured.

events.title: Emergency POTUS Address to Nation
events.description: President vows swift, disproportionate response if attacks continue.

events.title: Global Markets React
events.description: Asian markets crash by 6%. European markets open sharply lower.
events.impact: Flight to safety in US Treasuries and Gold.

events.title: Missile Strike on Saudi Oil Installation
events.description: Abqaiq facility targeted again, multiple fires reported.

events.title: Israel Strikes Beirut Suburbs
events.description: Retaliation against Hezbollah command centers.

events.title: Houthi Missile Intercepted Over Eilat
events.description: Israel's Arrow-3 intercepts surface-to-surface missile.

events.title: Pope Calls for Halt to Spiral of Violence
events.description: Vatican issues desperate plea for peace and negotiations.

events.title: Strait of Hormuz Effectively Closed
events.description: Burning tankers block shipping lanes. Insurance premiums halt traffic.

events.title: US B-2 Bombers Deployed
events.description: Stealth bombers seen leaving Diego Garcia, heading towards Iran.

events.title: Massive Blackout in Northern Israel
events.description: Suspected combined cyber and kinetic attack knocks out power grid.

events.title: UN Security Council Deadlocks
events.description: US vetoes ceasefire resolution demanding complete Israeli withdrawal.

events.title: Second Wave Warnings Sirens Sound in UAE
events.description: Incoming missile alerts trigger mass panic in Dubai and Abu Dhabi.
